violations.message: pytest is configured with testpaths and markers, but coverage is not configured. No [tool.coverage] or pytest-cov dependency found.
violations.suggestion:
Add `pytest-cov` to dev dependencies and configure coverage in pyproject.toml, e.g.:
[tool.pytest.ini_options]
addopts = "--cov=configsloader --cov-report=term-missing"

[tool.coverage.run]
source = ["configsloader"]
